blockingIssues.description: packages/server/prisma/schema.prisma allows Issue.stateId to reference a WorkflowState from a different team because Issue.teamId is not tied to the selected state, so team-scoped state integrity is unenforced.

packages/server/prisma/seed-helpers.ts installs TEAMKEY-N identifier automation only during seeding; after a fresh prisma db push, Issue.identifier still defaults to an empty string until seed runs, so identifier generation is not guaranteed as core database behavior.

appliedUpdates.description: Added commands.init pointing to .factory/init.sh so workers have an explicit setup command for the postgres proxy, .env refresh, and Prisma initialization steps.

Updated .factory/library/environment.md to document the postgres_proxy requirement on 127.0.0.1:4202, the committed packages/server/prisma/.env symlink, and the need to run init before Prisma or validator commands.
Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to record that auth accepts either Bearer tokens or raw Authorization header tokens for Linear-compatibility.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Adjust backend-worker guidance so scaffold/setup features can satisfy the procedure with validator coverage and zero-test Vitest configuration, instead of requiring prewritten tests in every case.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The monorepo-scaffold review found the feature met its explicit acceptance criteria while still needing a skillFeedback deviation because the current backend-worker procedure requires creating tests before implementation even for scaffold-only tasks.
